context150k+.description: usage at or above the context threshold
context150k+.callback: Compact mid-task or clear when switching tasks.

longRunning8h+.description: usage from sessions that span the long-running threshold
longRunning8h+.callback: Long background sessions should be intentional.

parallel4+.description: usage while 4+ sessions were active in the lookback window
parallel4+.callback: Queue work when you do not need every session at once.

subagentHeavy.description: usage from sessions where sidechain requests dominate
